coded_turns_ordered.title: Coded turns (by transcript and turn order)
coded_turns_ordered.sql: SELECT transcript_id, split, turn_number, speaker, text, word_count, char_count, turn_type, biasing_response, missed_opportunity, notes, coded_by FROM coded_turns ORDER BY transcript_id, turn_number

biasing_responses.title: All biasing response turns
biasing_responses.sql: SELECT transcript_id, split, turn_number, speaker, text, turn_type, notes FROM coded_turns WHERE biasing_response = 1 ORDER BY transcript_id, turn_number

missed_opportunities.title: All missed opportunity turns
missed_opportunities.sql: SELECT transcript_id, split, turn_number, speaker, text, turn_type, notes FROM coded_turns WHERE missed_opportunity = 1 ORDER BY transcript_id, turn_number

follow_ups.title: All follow-up turns
follow_ups.sql: SELECT transcript_id, split, turn_number, speaker, text, notes FROM coded_turns WHERE turn_type = 'follow_up' ORDER BY transcript_id, turn_number

llm_coded_turns_ordered.title: LLM-coded turns (by transcript and turn order)
llm_coded_turns_ordered.sql: SELECT transcript_id, split, turn_number, speaker, text, word_count, char_count, turn_type, biasing_response, missed_opportunity, notes FROM llm_coded_turns ORDER BY transcript_id, turn_number

llm_biasing_responses.title: LLM-coded: all biasing response turns
llm_biasing_responses.sql: SELECT transcript_id, split, turn_number, speaker, text, turn_type, notes FROM llm_coded_turns WHERE biasing_response = 1 ORDER BY transcript_id, turn_number

llm_missed_opportunities.title: LLM-coded: all missed opportunity turns
llm_missed_opportunities.sql: SELECT transcript_id, split, turn_number, speaker, text, turn_type, notes FROM llm_coded_turns WHERE missed_opportunity = 1 ORDER BY transcript_id, turn_number
